architecture.description: A web application that allows users to view current weather conditions, hourly forecasts, and daily forecasts for a specified location.

endpoints.description: Fetches current weather, hourly forecast, and daily forecast data for a given city.

pages.name: Weather Display Page
pages.description: Main page displaying current weather, hourly, and daily forecasts for a user-specified city.

assumptions: Application type assumed to be a web application.
Key features assumed to include current weather, hourly forecast, and daily forecast.
Weather data source/API assumed to be OpenWeatherMap for weather data.
Location input method assumed to be search by city name.
Units of measurement assumed to default to Celsius and km/h, with an option to switch to Fahrenheit and mph.
User authentication assumed not to be required for basic functionality.
Database requirements assumed not to be required for basic functionality (no user accounts or saved locations).
Styling preferences assumed to be modern and minimalist.
Technology stack preferences assumed to be React for frontend, Node.js for backend (if API proxy needed), and deployed on a cloud platform like AWS.
Monetization strategy assumed to be free for the initial version.
